tweet_text: 🚨 Liverpool and Wales legend John Toshack, 77, has been diagnosed with dementia, confirmed by his son Cameron. Toshack, a football icon, had a stellar playing and managerial career. 💔⚽ #FootballLegend #DementiaAwareness
article_title: Liverpool and Wales legend John Toshack diagnosed with dementia

tweet_text: 🚨 A man has avoided jail after racially abusing Lionesses star Jess Carter with vile messages during the 2025 European Championship. Nigel Dewale sent 'disgusting' messages while she played for England. #JusticeForJess #EndRacism
article_title: Man who racially abused Lionesses hero Jess Carter with vile messages avoids jail

tweet_text: 🚨 FIFA breaks its own rule ahead of the 2026 World Cup due to stadium issues in the U.S. after 18 months of discussions! Sleep-deprived officials are scrambling for solutions! ⚽️🏟️ #WorldCup2026 #FIFA
article_title: FIFA forced to break own rule for 2026 World Cup over problem that caused 'sleepless nights'
